updates.tweet_text: The hardest part of trading isnt the trading, its the waiting. The market will throw up 1-3 A+ setups most days (more in high volatility) but the catch is you need to plan them, wait on them, and not blow capital on 50/50, mediocre, boredom or impulse trades in the meantime.
updates.notes: Pure trading philosophy commentary. No prices, no levels, no actionable setups mentioned whatsoever.

updates.tweet_text: @Wes_Trades_ Boredom trades are a major loss causer!
updates.notes: No price levels mentioned at all; purely motivational/advisory commentary about avoiding boredom trades.

updates.tweet_text:

updates.tweet_text:
